summary: DHH posts a brief classified ad in Danish selling his Mac Mini for 3,500 DKK (originally ~5,000 DKK). He lists the specs—1.25GHz processor, 40GB storage, 512MB RAM, Airport Extreme, Bluetooth, and combo drive—and notes it still has a couple months of Apple warranty remaining. He asks interested buyers to contact him before Tuesday morning when he leaves for the US. This is a simple personal listing with no broader argument or commentary.
key_points: DHH is selling his Mac Mini at a ~30% discount from its original price
The machine was purchased in January 2005 and still has remaining Apple warranty
He frames the offer as a chance for someone considering switching to Mac to try it affordably
The post is entirely in Danish, reflecting his early Danish-language blogging before switching to English
money_quotes: Hvis du overvejer at switche, eller i det mindste bare snuse til det grønne græs på den anden side, så har jeg lige tilbudet.
key_insight: A brief Danish-language classified ad from DHH's early blogging days selling his Mac Mini, notable only as a historical artifact with no substantive argument or insight.
